goal: 移除 cxsd 本地开发入口和文档机制

summary.title: 移除 cxsd 开发入口
summary.what: Updated AGENTS.md to remove the cxsd development CLI and skill alias mechanism. Local checkout validation now uses npm run cxs -- <args>, installed behavior uses cxs <args>, and agents are told not to create cxsd skills or symlinks.
summary.why: The user decided that cxsd adds an unnecessary second entrypoint and increases drift risk between the published CLI, local checkout, and skill guidance.
summary.user_goal: 移除 cxsd 本地开发入口和文档机制

decisions.chose: Use npm run cxs -- <args> for checkout-backed verification.
decisions.rationale: It keeps development verification explicit without introducing a second installed command.

decisions.chose: Keep only cxs and the cxs skill; do not maintain cxsd aliases or symlinks.
decisions.rationale: One public command surface is easier for agents to reason about and avoids local/published drift.

rejected.alternative: Keep cxsd as a symlink alias to the same skill package.
rejected.reason: Even as a symlink, it creates a second name and an extra debugging branch.

review_notes: Verification: npm run cxs -- --version and cxs --version both report 0.3.2.
Verification: cxsd is no longer found on PATH.
Verification: global skills list shows cxs and no cxsd.

architectural_claims: cxs has one supported command/skill identity; local checkout validation uses npm run cxs rather than a separate cxsd alias.
migration_notes: Local cxsd command and cxsd skill symlinks were removed from this machine.
No npm release is required because the changed file is repository agent guidance, not packaged CLI runtime.
